calendar.matters:
Minors' Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Maureen McGowan, Esq. for Petitioner: Rosario Lopez, present as Guardian at litem for: Felipe G. Lopez IV and Rosario G. Lopez, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved as follows:
Attorney's Fees $2,301.95
Costs $178.19
A net balance of $6,905.86 for each minor, to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, 3600 San Pablo Ave., Hercules, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Julie Grebel, Esq. for Petitioner: Rosario Lopez, present as guardian ad litem for: Felipe G. Lopez and Rosario G. Lopez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved (only as to the PETITIONS for hearing today.) as follows: for each minor
Reimbursement of $1,091.17.
Attorney's fees: $1,002.21
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of $3,006.62 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner: Rosario Lopez, to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor, and no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order.
Order signed in court.
